sections: HCM-0.4 crate ownership and dependency contract

repo_truth: The exact three-file HCM-0.5 planning subject is the only review subject. Two prior immutable complete-subject planning dispatches exist and consume Reviews 1 and 2; this invocation is Review 3. HCM-0.4 is completed dependency evidence, HCM-0.9 is abandoned with no authority, canonical 05 remains monolithic/preliminary for HCM-0.5, and no runtime implementation exists or is authorized. Judge the current manifest independently without prior reviewer conclusions.
allowed_scope: Read and replay the exact three-file subject manifest and the named authority sections.
Run read-only Markdown, schema/example, link, portability, Git, and handoff checks needed to validate the plan.
Review whether the packet is independently executable and sufficiently exact for the parent to apply the HCM-0.5 design freeze after CLEAN.
non_goals: No repository edits, commits, new dispatches, global handoff, ledger write, or user task hop by the reviewer.
No Rust/runtime work, HCM-0.6 default selection, HCM-0.9 repair/resume, contract-catalog decomposition, leaf files, or runtime proof-gate promotion.
Do not treat HCM-0.4 completion or the existing preliminary HCM-0.5 prose as proof that the proposed semantics are correct.
tasks: Replay the exact three-file subject manifest and confirm this is Review 3 with Reviews 1 and 2 already consumed.

Review whether the packet independently and exactly closes contract identity/SemVer, immutable lifecycle adjacency/authorities, claim applicability, all-of per-kind evidence requirements/cardinality/precedence, score omission, verdict compatibility, and hard-fail gate composition.

Review evidence identity, provenance, freshness, subject/case/source bindings, complete six-dimension Resolution limits, and the exclusive handbook-contracts authority for normalization/verdict/gate creation.

Review the process dock manifest and protocol for exact content-addressed implementation bundle/entrypoint/bundled-runtime closure, host mapping verification before body access/spawn, one-document JSON framing, default-deny isolation, unconditional v1 no-network, resource limits, cancellation/timeout/process-tree cleanup, failure/refusal, and no partial evidence.
Review dock.run and contract.evidence.append against the exact HCM-0.4 owner/mutability/idempotency/exactly-one write-set/receipt contract for every admitted/refused/failed/candidate outcome.
Review the evidence-backed JSON Schema first-proof-dock selection, bounded responsibility, and no product/default/runtime authority expansion.
Review affected 01-06 plan, proof wall, negative cases, task order, no HCM-0.2/0.3/0.4 rewrite, no HCM-0.6/HCM-0.9/leaf/runtime work, and exact Review 4/no-Review-5 stop behavior.

Return findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit with exact file/line, violated authority/objective, impact, smallest remediation, and verification. Return CLEAN only if no actionable finding remains.
contracts_and_gates: 04 HCM-0.5 objective and exit gate; Phase 0 non-goals; Phase 5 HCM-5.1 through HCM-5.4 boundaries
01 invariants 1, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9, 20, and 21 plus the dock posture
05 frozen HCM-0.4 owner/operation/transport contracts and preliminary HCM-0.5 sections
06 open PG-CONTRACT-01, PG-DOCK-01, PG-GATE-01 and applicable regression rules
User review budget: four complete-subject submissions, three remediation rounds, no fifth review
stop_conditions: Return a Required finding if the packet would require product authority, broader scope, runtime proof, or redesign before canonical edits.
Return blocked if the exact subject/authority or required read-only capability is unavailable.
Do not modify repository state or write orchestration artifacts.
